reasoning:
Wei Yi's rating on the Wikipedia FIDE Rankings page as of April 13, 2025 is 2758. A 1% increase requires his rating to reach at least 2785.58 by the resolution dates. The FIDE ratings page on Wikipedia is generally updated shortly after the beginning of every month to reflect the official FIDE lists. Consequently, by April 20, 2025, the page will almost certainly still display the April 1 list (2758), meaning it is effectively impossible for the rating to have increased by then. We assign the minimum allowed probability (0.05) to this first date.

For the subsequent dates (May 13, July 12, Oct 10), gaining 28 Elo points from a 2758 baseline is extremely difficult, as the K-factor for top players is 10, meaning he would need to outperform his expected score by ~2.8 points against mostly 2750+ opposition. While Wei Yi has been on a hot streak over the past year (reaching his peak rating of 2758), reaching 2786 would place him in historic top-5 territory. The base rate for super-GMs logging this level of rating gain over a 1 to 6-month horizon is low, but the probability scales up marginally as the time horizon expands to allow for multiple tournament cycles.
